enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
भारतीय įरज़वर् बैंक RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
RBI/DOR/2025-26/260 DOR.MRG.REC.No.179/00-00-001/2025-26


 November 28, 2025
Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Classification, Valuation and
Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025 (Updated as on May 18,
2026)
Table of Contents
enriched_requirements.object: Contents

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into effect from the date of issue.
enriched_requirements.object: the date of issue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RRBs' and individually as 'RRB').
enriched_requirements.object: Rural Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'RRBs' and individually as 'RRB')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the
terms herein shall bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Available for Sale' (AFS) means the category of investment portfolio of
an RRB, which does not fall within the Held to Maturity (HTM), or Held for
Trading (HFT) category.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Available for Sale' (AFS) means the category of investment portfolio of an RRB, which does not fall wit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'Current or Valid Credit Rating' for the purpose of determining rated
security means a credit rating granted by a credit rating agency in India,
registered with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) and
fulfilling the following conditions:
i The credit rating letter and rating rationale from the credit rating agency
shall preferably be part of offer document.
enriched_requirements.object: offer document

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
ii The credit rating letter shall not be more than one month old and rating
rationale shall not be more than one year old from the date of opening of
issue.
enriched_requirements.object: month old and rating rationale shall not be more than one year old from the date of opening of issue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
iii In the case of secondary market acquisition, the credit rating of the issue
shall be in force and confirmed from the website of the respective credit
rating agency.
enriched_requirements.object: confirmed from the website of the respective credit rating agency

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Exchange' means 'Recognized stock exchange' and shall have the same
meaning as defined in Section 2 (f) of Securities Contracts (Regulation) Act,
1956, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: as defined in Section 2 (f) of Securities Contracts (Regulation) Act, 1956, as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of overseas jurisdictions,
it shall refer to an exchange which is recognised or authorised by the
securities market regulator of that jurisdiction.
enriched_requirements.object: which is recognised or authorised by the securities market regulator of that jurisdiction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'Held to Maturity' (HTM) means the category of investment portfolio
maintained by an RRB with the intention to hold securities upto maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: portfolio maintained by an RRB with the intention to hold securities upto maturity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'Held for Trading' (HFT) means the category of investment portfolio
maintained by an RRB with the intention to trade in securities by taking
advantage of the short- term price / interest rate movements.
enriched_requirements.object: portfolio maintained by an RRB with the intention to trade in securities by taking advantage of the short- term price / int

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) 'Rated Security' means a security which carries current or valid credit
rating.
enriched_requirements.object: current or valid credit rating

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) 'Unrated securities' means securities which do not have a current or valid
credit rating.
enriched_requirements.object: have a current or valid credit rating

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations
made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of Directors (Board) shall approve the Investment Policy of an RRB
as specified in paragraph 15(1).
enriched_requirements.object: of an RRB as specified in paragraph 15(1)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall be responsible for the overall management of the investment
portfolio of the RRB and shall take all investment decisions, as specified in
paragraph 22.
enriched_requirements.object: overall management of the investment portfolio of the RRB and shall take all investment decisions, as specified in paragraph 22

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board / ALCO / Investment Committee shall approve the transfer of
securities within various categories as specified in paragraphs 36 to 42.
enriched_requirements.object: securities within various categories as specified in paragraphs 36 to 42

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall fix a limit for the RRB's total investment in non-SLR securities
subject to prudential limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank and shall also
prescribe sub-limits for total investments in each security-type as specified in
paragraph 78.
enriched_requirements.object: the RRB's total investment in non-SLR securities subject to prudential limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank and shall also prescribe

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall ensure that appropriate risk management systems are in place
for capturing and analysing risks in respect of non-SLR investments and take
remedial measures in time as specified in paragraph 86.
enriched_requirements.object: management systems are in place for capturing and analysing risks in respect of non-SLR investments and take remedial mea

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall review the various aspects of non-SLR investment at least twice
a year as specified in paragraph 87.
enriched_requirements.object: of non-SLR investment at least twice a year as specified in paragraph 87

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall approve the panel of brokers with whom an RRB can do
business with as specified in paragraph 90.
enriched_requirements.object: brokers with whom an RRB can do business with as specified in paragraph 90

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall be post facto informed of the breach of aggregate upper contract
limit for individual brokers as specified in paragraph 92(4).
enriched_requirements.object: of the breach of aggregate upper contract limit for individual brokers as specified in paragraph 92(4)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall review, on a half-yearly basis (as of March 31st and September
30th) the RRB's investment portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: basis (as of March 31st and September 30th) the RRB's investment portfolio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The review shall be placed before the Board
within two months from the end of the respective half-year, i.e., by end-May and
end-November as specified in paragraph 99.0
<image>
enriched_requirements.object: Board within two months from the end of the respective half-year, i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall undertake investment activities as per the terms and conditions
specified in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: per the terms and conditions specified in these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) An RRB shall adopt a comprehensive Investment Policy duly approved by
the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: Policy duly approved by the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The Investment Policy shall, at the minimum, include:
i The investment criteria and objectives to be achieved while undertaking
investment transactions keeping in view the various regulatory / statutory
guidelines and the RRB's own internal requirements;
enriched_requirements.object: include: i The investment criteria and objectives to be achieved while undertaking investment transactions keeping in view the vario

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
vii Proper risk management systems for making investment in non-SLR
securities which shall include entry-level minimum credit ratings / quality
standards and industry-wise, maturity-wise, duration-wise, and issuer-
wise limits to mitigate the adverse impact of concentration and liquidity
risk.
enriched_requirements.object: ratings / quality standards and industry-wise, maturity-wise, duration-wise, and issuer- wise limits to mitigate th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The procedures to be adopted by the RRB under the Investment Policy
shall be consistent, transparent, and well documented to facilitate easy
verification by inspectors and statutory auditors.
enriched_requirements.object: well documented to facilitate easy verification by inspectors and statutory auditors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall undertake all transactions in securities only on its own investment
account.
enriched_requirements.object: securities only on its own investment account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall not undertake any transactions on behalf of Portfolio
Management Scheme (PMS) clients.
enriched_requirements.object: behalf of Portfolio Management Scheme (PMS) clients

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investment proposals shall be subjected to same degree of credit analysis as
any loan proposal, irrespective of the fact that the proposed investments may be
in rated securities.
enriched_requirements.object: degree of credit analysis as any loan proposal, irrespective of the fact that the proposed investments may be in rated securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall make its own internal credit analysis and credit rating even in
respect of rated issues and shall not entirely rely on the ratings of external credit
rating agencies.
enriched_requirements.object: ratings of external credit rating agencies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure robust internal credit rating systems, including a
mechanism for regular (quarterly or half-yearly) tracking of the financial position
of the issuer to ensure continuous monitoring of the rating migration of the issuers
/ issues.
enriched_requirements.object: rating systems, including a mechanism for regular (quarterly or half-yearly) tracking of the financial position of the i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall settle the transactions in securities as per procedure prescribed in
notifications / directions / guidelines issued by the concerned regulator.
enriched_requirements.object: securities as per procedure prescribed in notifications / directions / guidelines issued by the concerned regulator

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An RRB shall hold its investments in securities only in dematerialised form.
enriched_requirements.object: securities only in dematerialised form

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB may seek aid and advise of its sponsor bank on an on-going basis
regarding the choice of investment avenues, availability of investable instruments
in the market, yield thereon, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: of its sponsor bank on an on-going basis regarding the choice of investment avenues, availability of investable instruments in the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The investment decisions shall, however, be
taken by the Board of RRB who shall be responsible for the overall management
of the investment portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: by the Board of RRB who shall be responsible for the overall management of the investment portfolio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB may enter into pre-determined arrangements
with its sponsor bank for remittance of funds for purposes of investment.
enriched_requirements.object: with its sponsor bank for remittance of funds for purposes of investment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall appoint a nodal officer to liaise with sponsor bank regarding various
matters pertaining to the management of its investment portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: to liaise with sponsor bank regarding various matters pertaining to the management of its investment portfolio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall get its investment portfolio reviewed on a quarterly basis by the
sponsor bank to ensure compliance with various rules, regulations and
guidelines stipulated in this regard.
enriched_requirements.object: reviewed on a quarterly basis by the sponsor bank to ensure compliance with various rules, regulations and guidelines sti

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall get the rate of return on the investments reviewed annually by
sponsor bank and suitable corrective measures shall be taken in case the same
falls below the averaged-out rate of return on sponsor bank's investments
portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: return on the investments reviewed annually by sponsor bank and suitable corrective measures shall be taken in case the same falls bel

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall classify its entire investment portfolio (including SLR securities and
non-SLR securities) under three categories, viz., 'Held to Maturity' (HTM),
'Available for Sale' (AFS), and 'Held for Trading' (HFT).
enriched_requirements.object: portfolio (including SLR securities and non-SLR securities) under three categories, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall decide the category of the investment at the time of acquisition and
the decision shall be recorded on the investment proposal.
enriched_requirements.object: the investment at the time of acquisition and the decision shall be recorded on the investment proposal

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall disclose the investments in the Balance Sheet as set out in The
Third Schedule to the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (Form A, Schedule 8 -
Investments) as under:
(1) Government Securities;
enriched_requirements.object: the Balance Sheet as set out in The Third Schedule to the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (Form A, Schedule 8 - Investments)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investments under HTM category shall not exceed 25 per cent of an RRB's total
investments.
enriched_requirements.object: of an RRB's total investments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have the option to exceed the limit of 25 per cent of its total
investments under HTM category provided the excess comprises of SLR
securities.
enriched_requirements.object: exceed the limit of 25 per cent of its total investments under HTM category provided the excess comprises of SLR securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that the total SLR securities held in the HTM category is not more than
enriched_requirements.object: held in the HTM category is not more than

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An RRB shall not include non-SLR securities in HTM.
enriched_requirements.object: HTM

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Profit on sale of investments from HTM category shall be first taken to the Profit
& Loss Account and thereafter shall be appropriated to the 'Capital Reserve
Account'.
enriched_requirements.object: the Profit & Loss Account and thereafter shall be appropriated to the 'Capital Reserve Account'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The amount so appropriated shall be net of taxes and the amount
<image>
required to be transferred to Statutory Reserves.
enriched_requirements.object: and the amount <image> required to be transferred to Statutory Reserves

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Loss on sale shall be
recognised in the Profit & Loss Account.
enriched_requirements.object: Profit & Loss Account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The investments classified under HFT shall be sold within 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have the option to decide on the extent of investment holdings
under AFS and HFT, taking into account various aspects, viz., basis of intent,
trading strategies, risk management capabilities, tax planning, manpower skills,
capital position, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: decide on the extent of investment holdings under AFS and HFT, taking into account various aspects, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Profit or loss on sale of investments in HFT and AFS categories shall be taken
to the Profit & Loss Account.
enriched_requirements.object: Profit & Loss Account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have the option to shift investments to / from HTM category with
the approval of the Board once a year.
enriched_requirements.object: shift investments to / from HTM category with the approval of the Board once a year

conditions: Provided that such shifting shall be done at the beginning of the accounting year
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that such shifting shall be done at the beginning of the accounting year.
enriched_requirements.object: beginning of the accounting year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that additional shifting to / from HTM category shall not be done
during the remaining part of that accounting year.
enriched_requirements.object: remaining part of that accounting year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Transfer of securities from AFS / HFT category to HTM category shall be made
at the lower of book value and market value.
enriched_requirements.object: lower of book value and market value

conditions:
Provided that where the market value is higher than the book value at the time
of transfer
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that where the market value is higher than the book value at the time
of transfer, the appreciation shall be ignored, and the security shall be transferred
at the book value.
enriched_requirements.object: security shall be transferred at the book value

conditions:
where the market value is lower than the book
value
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in cases where the market value is lower than the book
value, the provision for depreciation held against this security (including the
additional provision, if any, required based on valuation done on the date of
transfer) shall be adjusted to reduce the book value to the market value and the
security shall be transferred at the market value.
enriched_requirements.object: the book value to the market value and the security shall be transferred at the market value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Transfer of securities from HTM to AFS / HFT category shall be subject to the
following conditions:
<image>
(1) Security originally placed under the HTM category at a discount shall be
transferred to AFS / HFT category at the acquisition price / book value.
enriched_requirements.object: following conditions: <image> (1) Security originally placed under the HTM category at a discount shall be transferred to AFS / HFT

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An
RRB shall not accrue the discount on the securities held under HTM
category and such securities shall be held at the acquisition cost till
maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: the securities held under HTM category and such securities shall be held at the acquisition cost till maturity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Security originally placed under the HTM category at a premium shall be
transferred to the AFS / HFT category at the amortised cost.
enriched_requirements.object: AFS / HFT category at the amortised cost

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Securities shall be immediately re-valued consequent to transfer and
resultant depreciation, if any, shall be provided for.
enriched_requirements.object: to transfer and resultant depreciation

conditions: In case of transfers of securities to / from HTM category
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of transfers of securities to / from HTM category, an RRB shall make
disclosure in the 'Notes to Accounts' to the Financial Statements as provided in
Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Financial Statements:
Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Notes to Accounts' to the Financial Statements as provided in Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Financial Statemen

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have the option to shift investments from AFS category to HFT
category with the approval of its Board / ALCO / Investment Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: shift investments from AFS category to HFT category with the approval of its Board / ALCO / Investment Committee

conditions: Provided that in case of exigencies
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in case of exigencies, shifting can be done with the approval of the
Chief Executive of the RRB, but shall be ratified by the Board / ALCO /
Investment Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: Board / ALCO / Investment Committee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Shifting of investments from HFT category to AFS category shall not be
permitted.

conditions:
where the RRB is not in a position to sell the security within 90 days due to tight
liquidity conditions
enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 90 days due to tight
liquidity conditions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the above prohibition shall not apply in exceptional circumstances
where the RRB is not in a position to sell the security within 90 days due to tight
liquidity conditions, or extreme volatility, or market becoming unidirectional.
enriched_requirements.object: where the RRB is not in a position to sell the security within 90 days due to tight liquidity conditions, or extrem

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that such transfer shall be done only with the approval of the
Board / ALCO / Investment Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: the approval of the Board / ALCO / Investment Committee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of transfer of securities from AFS to HFT category or vice-versa, the
securities need not be re-valued on the date of transfer and the provisions for the
accumulated depreciation, if any, held shall be transferred to the provisions for
depreciation against the HFT securities and vice-versa.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions for depreciation against the HFT securities and vice-versa

conditions:
provided that it is less than
the face value of the security
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The investment shall be carried at acquisition cost provided that it is less than
the face value of the security.
enriched_requirements.object: cost provided that it is less than the face value of the security

conditions: If acquisition cost is more than the face value
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If acquisition cost is more than the face value, the premium arising out of
difference between face value and acquisition cost shall be amortised over the
period remaining to maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: period remaining to maturity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) An RRB shall reflect the amortised amount in Schedule 13 - Interest
Earned: Item II - Income on Investments as a deduction and such amount
need not be disclosed separately.
enriched_requirements.object: in Schedule 13 - Interest Earned: Item II - Income on Investments as a deduction and such amount need not be disclosed se

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The book value of the security shall continue to be reduced to the extent of
the amount amortised during the relevant accounting period.
enriched_requirements.object: to the extent of the amount amortised during the relevant accounting period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The individual securities in the HFT category shall be marked to market at
monthly or at more frequent intervals.
enriched_requirements.object: at monthly or at more frequent intervals

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The individual securities in the AFS category shall be marked to market at
quarterly or at more frequent intervals.
enriched_requirements.object: at quarterly or at more frequent intervals

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The book value of individual securities in HFT and AFS shall not undergo any
change after marking to market.
enriched_requirements.object: marking to market

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Securities under AFS and HFT categories shall be separately valued security-
wise and depreciation / appreciation shall be aggregated for purpose of arriving
at net depreciation / appreciation of investments for each classification referred
to in paragraph 28 (viz., Government Securities, other approved securities,
Shares, Debentures & Bonds, Subsidiaries and / or joint ventures and others (to
be specified)).
enriched_requirements.object: wise and depreciation / appreciation shall be aggregated for purpose of arriving at net depreciation / appreciation of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Net depreciation, if any, shall be provided for.

Net appreciation, if
any, shall be ignored.

Net depreciation required to be provided for in any one classification shall not be
reduced on account of net appreciation in any other classification.
enriched_requirements.object: of net appreciation in any other classification

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The 'market value' for the purpose of periodical valuation of investments included
in the AFS and the HFT categories shall be as provided in this Chapter.
enriched_requirements.object: this Chapter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The 'market value' for the quoted securities shall be the prices declared by the
Financial Benchmarks India Pvt.
enriched_requirements.object: by the Financial Benchmarks India Pvt

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For securities whose prices are not published by FBIL, market price of
the quoted security shall be as available from the trades / quotes on the
exchanges / reporting platforms / trading platforms authorised by RBI / SEBI and
prices declared by Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives Association of
India (FIMMDA).
enriched_requirements.object: the trades / quotes on the exchanges / reporting platforms / trading platforms authorised by RBI / SEBI and prices declared by Fi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Treasury Bills shall be valued at carrying cost.
enriched_requirements.object: cost

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Unquoted Central / State Government Securities shall be valued on the basis of
the prices / YTM rates published by the FBIL.
enriched_requirements.object: basis of the prices / YTM rates published by the FBIL

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Other Approved Securities shall be valued applying the YTM method by marking
them up by 25 basis points above the yields of the Central Government Securities
of equivalent maturity put out by FBIL.
enriched_requirements.object: YTM method by marking them up by 25 basis points above the yields of the Central Government Securities of equivalent maturity p

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Unquoted debentures and bonds
(1) Unquoted debentures and bonds shall be valued by applying the
appropriate mark-up over the YTM rates for Central Government Securities
as put out by FBIL / FIMMDA.
enriched_requirements.object: the appropriate mark-up over the YTM rates for Central Government Securities as put out by FBIL / FIMMDA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The mark-up applied shall be determined based on the ratings assigned to
the debentures / bonds by the credit rating agencies and shall be subject to
the following:
<image>
i The mark-up shall be at least 50 basis points above the rate applicable
to a Central Government Security of equivalent maturity for rated
debentures / bonds.
enriched_requirements.object: the ratings assigned to the debentures / bonds by the credit rating agencies and shall be subject to the following: <image> i T

conditions:
Where the debenture / bonds are quoted and there have been
transactions within 15 days prior to the valuation date
enriched_requirements.timeline: within 15 days prior to the valuation date
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
ii Where the debenture / bonds are quoted and there have been
transactions within 15 days prior to the valuation date, the value adopted
shall not be higher than the rate at which the transaction is recorded on
exchanges / trading platforms / reporting platforms authorised by RBI /
SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: rate at which the transaction is recorded on exchanges / trading platforms / reporting platforms authorised by RBI / SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Special Securities issued by the Government of India
The special securities (Oil Bonds, Fertiliser Bonds, bonds issued to the State
Bank of India (during the 2008 rights issue), Industrial Finance Corporation of
India Ltd., and Food Corporation of India), which are directly issued by the
Government of India and which do not carry SLR status, shall be valued at a
spread of 25 bps above the corresponding yield on Central Government
Securities of equivalent maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: spread of 25 bps above the corresponding yield on Central Government Securities of equivalent maturity

conditions:
When a preference share has been traded on an exchange within 15 days
prior to the valuation date
enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 15 days
prior to the valuation date
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Preference Shares
(1) When a preference share has been traded on an exchange within 15 days
prior to the valuation date, the value shall not be higher than the price at
which the share was traded.
enriched_requirements.object: price at which the share was traded

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The valuation of unquoted preference shares shall be on YTM basis with
appropriate mark-up over the YTM rates for Central Government Securities
of equivalent maturity put out by the FBIL subject to such preference share
not being valued above its redemption value.
enriched_requirements.object: with appropriate mark-up over the YTM rates for Central Government Securities of equivalent maturity put out by the FBIL subject to su

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The mark-up shall be graded
according to the ratings assigned to the preference shares by the credit
rating agencies and the mark-up cannot be negative, i.e., the YTM rate shall
not be lower than the coupon rate / YTM for a Central Government Security
of equivalent maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: the ratings assigned to the preference shares by the credit rating agencies and the mark-up cannot be negative, i

conditions: Where preference dividends / coupons are in arrears

if arrears are for
one year
if arrears are for two years
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Where preference dividends / coupons are in arrears, no credit shall be
taken for accrued dividends / coupons and the value determined as above
on YTM shall be discounted further by at least 15 per cent if arrears are for
one year, 25 per cent if arrears are for two years, so on and so forth (i.e.,
with 10 per cent increments).
enriched_requirements.object: dividends / coupons and the value determined as above on YTM shall be discounted further by at least 15 per cent if arrears are f

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The overarching principle should be that
<image>
valuation shall be based on conservative assessment of cash flows and
appropriate discount rates to reflect the risk.
enriched_requirements.object: assessment of cash flows and appropriate discount rates to reflect the risk

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Statutory Auditors shall also
specifically examine as to whether the valuations adequately reflect the risk
associated with such instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: to whether the valuations adequately reflect the risk associated with such instruments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The depreciation / provision requirement
arrived at in respect of non-performing shares where dividends are in
arrears shall not be allowed to be set-off against appreciation on other
performing preference shares.
enriched_requirements.object: set-off against appreciation on other performing preference shares

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Equity Shares
(1) The equity shares in an RRB's portfolio shall be marked to market
preferably on a daily basis, but at least on a weekly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: preferably on a daily basis, but at least on a weekly basis

conditions: In case of equity shares for which current quotations are not available
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In case of equity shares for which current quotations are not available, i.e.,
which are classified as illiquid or which are not listed on a recognised
exchange, the value for the purposes of these Directions shall be the break-
up value (without considering 'revaluation reserves', if any) which is to be
ascertained from the company's latest balance sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: value (without considering 'revaluation reserves'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The date as on which
the latest balance sheet is drawn up shall not precede the date of valuation
by more than 18 months.
enriched_requirements.object: valuation by more than 18 months

conditions:
In case the latest audited balance sheet is not
available or is more than 18 months old
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the latest audited balance sheet is not
available or is more than 18 months old, the shares shall be valued at ₹1
per company.
enriched_requirements.object: per company

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Mutual Funds Units (MF Units)
(1) Investments in un-quoted MF units shall be valued on the basis of the latest
re-purchase price declared by the AMC in respect of each Scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: basis of the latest re-purchase price declared by the AMC in respect of each Scheme

conditions:
In case of funds with a lock-in period or any other mutual fund where
repurchase price / market quote is not available
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In case of funds with a lock-in period or any other mutual fund where
repurchase price / market quote is not available, the units shall be valued
at Net Asset Value (NAV) of the scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: Asset Value (NAV) of the scheme

conditions: If NAV is not available
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If NAV is not available, then these
shall be valued at cost, till the end of the lock-in period.
enriched_requirements.object: till the end of the lock-in period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Commercial Paper and Certificate of Deposits
Commercial Paper and Certificate of Deposits shall be valued at the carrying
cost.
enriched_requirements.object: carrying cost

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of investments in security receipts (SRs) and other instruments issued
by an Asset Reconstruction Company (ARC), an RRB shall comply with the
<image>
requirements of Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Transfer and
Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: requirements of Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Transactions in Government Securities shall be done through either Subsidiary
General Ledger (SGL) account or Gilt account opened with entities eligible to
open Constituent Subsidiary General Ledger (CSGL) account with RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: Subsidiary General Ledger (SGL) account or Gilt account opened with entities eligible to open Constituent Subsidiary General Le

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of maintaining Statutory Liquidity Ratio (SLR) required under
Section 24 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, an RRB shall refer to the
Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Cash Reserve Ratio and
Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Cash Reserve Ratio and Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall be eligible to access Negotiated Dealing System - Order Matching
(NDS-OM) either through direct access or through indirect access in terms of
Reserve Bank of India (Access Criteria for NDS-OM) Directions, 2024.
enriched_requirements.object: Negotiated Dealing System - Order Matching (NDS-OM) either through direct access or through indirect access in terms of Reserve

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB
maintaining gilt account may seek access to web-based NDS-OM module
through the Primary Member (i.e., entity with which gilt account is maintained)
for online trading in Government Securities in the secondary market in terms of
circular FMRD.DIRD.07/14.03.007/2016-17 dated October 20, 2016, as
amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: NDS-OM module through the Primary Member (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB having an SGL account shall not open / maintain a gilt account with a
CSGL account holder unless the RRB is permitted to maintain both SGL and gilt
account in terms of the 'Eligibility Criteria and Operational Guidelines for opening
and maintaining of Subsidiary General Ledger (SGL) Accounts and Constituents'
Subsidiary General Ledger (CSGL) Accounts' (Notification no.
enriched_requirements.object: gilt account with a CSGL account holder unless the RRB is permitted to maintain both SGL and gilt account in terms of the 'Eligibili

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An RRB shall not maintain more than one gilt account.
enriched_requirements.object: gilt account

conditions: In case an RRB has a gilt account with a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case an RRB has a gilt account with a bank, the RRB shall open a designated
funds account (for all gilt related transactions) with the same bank.
enriched_requirements.object: account (for all gilt related transactions) with the same bank

conditions:
In case an RRB has a gilt account with any of the eligible non-banking
institutions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case an RRB has a gilt account with any of the eligible non-banking
institutions, the particulars of the designated funds account (with a bank) shall
be intimated to that non-banking institution.
enriched_requirements.object: non-banking institution

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For transactions through SGL / gilt accounts, an RRB shall report / conclude
transactions on NDS-OM and clear / settle them through Clearing Corporation of
India Limited (CCIL) as central counterparty.
enriched_requirements.object: on NDS-OM and clear / settle them through Clearing Corporation of India Limited (CCIL) as central counterparty

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The settlement of transactions in Government Securities shall be governed by
the instructions issued vide FMRD.DIRD.06/14.03.007/2014-15 dated March 20,
2015, and paragraph 2.7 of Master Direction - Operational Guidelines for
Primary Dealers issued vide circular IDMD.PDRD.01/03.64.00/2016-17, 2016.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions issued vide FMRD

conditions:
if completed through the securities / funds shortage handling procedure of
CCIL
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any default in delivery of security / funds in an SGL sale / purchase transaction,
even if completed through the securities / funds shortage handling procedure of
CCIL, shall be reported to Public Debt Office (PDO), RBI immediately.
enriched_requirements.object: Debt Office (PDO), RBI immediately

conditions:
In case of
SGL bouncing
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of
SGL bouncing, an RRB shall be liable to pay penalties as per circular
IDMD.DOD.17/11.01.01(B)/2010-11 dated July 14, 2010, as amended from time
to time.
enriched_requirements.object: penalties as per circular IDMD

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have the option to submit bids in the competitive auctions for issue
of Government Securities as per guidelines prescribed in General Notification for
Sale and Issue of Government of India Securities (including Treasury Bills and
Cash Management Bills) issued vide IDMD.2320/ 08.01.01/2024-25 dated March
27, 2025, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: submit bids in the competitive auctions for issue of Government Securities as per guidelines prescribed in General Notification for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall also have the option to participate through non-competitive bidding
facility in auctions of:
(1) Dated Government of India Securities and Treasury Bills in terms of
scheme on 'Auction of Government Securities - Non-competitive Bidding
Facility to Retail Investors' issued vide circular
CO.IDMD.GBD(P).No.S1242/08.01.001/2021-22 dated November 12,
2021, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: to participate through non-competitive bidding facility in auctions of: (1) Dated Government of India Securities and Treasury Bil

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Repo transactions (including reverse repo transactions) entered by an RRB shall
be subject to guidelines specified in Repurchase Transactions (Repo) (Reserve
Bank) Directions, 2018.
enriched_requirements.object: specified in Repurchase Transactions (Repo) (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall also adhere to the following instructions while investing in non-SLR
securities in the primary as well as the secondary market:
Explanation: In the context of this Chapter, 'non-SLR securities' means securities
issued by corporates, bank, financial institutions, State and Central Government
sponsored institutions, etc., and shall also include capital gains bonds and bonds
eligible for priority sector status.
enriched_requirements.object: following instructions while investing in non-SLR securities in the primary as well as the secondary market: Explanation: In the co

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (1) An RRB shall not invest in unrated and / or unlisted non-SLR securities.
enriched_requirements.object: / or unlisted non-SLR securities
in a) Units of equity oriented mutual fund schemes, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An RRB shall invest only in listed non-SLR debt securities of companies
which comply with the requirements of the SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: non-SLR debt securities of companies which comply with the requirements of the SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall not invest
in non-SLR debt securities carrying a credit rating less than investment
grade.
enriched_requirements.object: securities carrying a credit rating less than investment grade

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Investment in units of mutual fund schemes where the entire
corpus is invested in debt securities and where such scheme have an
exposure to unlisted securities of less than 10 per cent of the corpus of the
fund shall be treated on par with listed securities for the purpose of
compliance with the provision in paragraph 76(1) and (2) above.
enriched_requirements.object: with listed securities for the purpose of compliance with the provision in paragraph 76(1) and (2) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) An RRB shall not invest in non-SLR securities of original maturity of less
than one-year, except for commercial paper and certificates of deposits.
enriched_requirements.object: of original maturity of less than one-year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) An RRB shall ensure that credit facilities for activities / purposes precluded
by RBI regulations are not financed through investment in non-SLR
securities.
enriched_requirements.object: for activities / purposes precluded by RBI regulations are not financed through investment in non-SLR securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For example, an RRB shall not extend any financial assistance to Non-
Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs).
enriched_requirements.object: to Non- Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB's incremental investment in shares and debentures of corporates and
units of mutual funds (including units of UTI) in any financial year shall be limited
to 5 per cent of the incremental deposits at the end of the preceding financial
year.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of the incremental deposits at the end of the preceding financial year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the ceiling of 5 per cent shall not be applicable for investments
covered under Paragraph 78(1) to (4) below.
enriched_requirements.object: covered under Paragraph 78(1) to (4) below

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of an RRB shall fix a limit for the RRB's total investment in non-SLR
securities subject to existing prudential limits prescribed by RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: the RRB's total investment in non-SLR securities subject to existing prudential limits prescribed by RBI
total investments in each security-type, for example: (1) Bonds of public sector undertakings

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All non-SLR investments shall be subject to the prescribed prudential single /
group counterparty exposure limits.
enriched_requirements.object: prescribed prudential single / group counterparty exposure limits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall undertake repo in corporate bonds as per guidelines given in
Repurchase Transactions (Repo) (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018.
enriched_requirements.object: bonds as per guidelines given in Repurchase Transactions (Repo) (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investment in CPs shall be as per guidelines given in Master Direction - Reserve
Bank of India (Commercial Paper and Non-Convertible Debentures of original or
initial maturity upto one year) Directions, 2024.
enriched_requirements.object: given in Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Paper and Non-Convertible Debentures of original or initial maturit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investment in CDs shall be as per guidelines given in Master Direction - Reserve
Bank of India (Certificate of Deposit) Directions, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: given in Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Certificate of Deposit) Directions, 2021

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Trades in listed corporate bonds shall be executed as per guidelines issued by
SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines issued by SEBI

conditions: In case of private placement of debt
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of private placement of debt, an investing RRB shall file a copy of all offer
documents with an RBI registered Credit Information Company (CIC).
enriched_requirements.object: all offer documents with an RBI registered Credit Information Company (CIC)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An
investing RRB shall ensure that any default relating to interest / instalment in
respect of any privately placed debt is reported to all RBI registered CICs along
with a copy of the offer document.
enriched_requirements.object: relating to interest / instalment in respect of any privately placed debt is reported to all RBI registered CICs along with a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall disclose the details of the issuer composition of non-SLR
investments and the non-performing non-SLR investments in the 'Notes on
Accounts' of the balance sheet, as per Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: the issuer composition of non-SLR investments and the non-performing non-SLR investments in the 'Notes on Accounts' of the bal

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall ensure that appropriate risk management systems are in place
for capturing and analysing risks in respect of non-SLR investments and take
remedial measures in time.
enriched_requirements.object: management systems are in place for capturing and analysing risks in respect of non-SLR investments and take remedial mea
of non-SLR investment at least twice a year: (1) Total business (investment and divestment) during the reporting period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall establish a robust internal control mechanism in respect of
investment transactions and shall, at a minimum, ensure the following:
(1) There shall be a clear functional separation of (a) trading, (b) settlement,
enriched_requirements.object: control mechanism in respect of investment transactions and shall, at a minimum, ensure the following: (1) There shall be

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) There shall be a functional separation of trading and back-office functions
relating to the RRB's own Investment Accounts and Other Constituents
(including brokers') Accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: of trading and back-office functions relating to the RRB's own Investment Accounts and Other Constituents (including broker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) Deal slips shall be prepared for every transaction entered into.
enriched_requirements.object: transaction entered into

conditions:
if through
a broker
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Deal Slips
shall be serially numbered, properly accounted for and shall contain all the
details of the deal such as name of the counterparty, details of security,
category (i.e., HTM, AFS, or HFT) in which it shall be held, amount, price,
contract date and time, settlement date, confirmation mode to the
counterparty, whether it is a direct deal or through a broker, and if through
a broker, name of the broker, brokerage payable etc.
enriched_requirements.object: accounted for and shall contain all the details of the deal such as name of the counterparty, details of security, cate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Back-office shall
monitor timely receipt of confirmation from the counterparty, except where
the requirement is waived off in terms of circulars IDMD.No.766/
10.26.65A/2005-06 dated August 22, 2005 and FMRD.FMID.01/
14.01.02/2014-15 dated December 19, 2014.
enriched_requirements.object: confirmation from the counterparty

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The books of accounts shall be updated independently, on the basis of
vouchers passed, after verification of actual contract notes received from
the broker / counterparty and confirmation of the deal by the counterparty.
enriched_requirements.object: the basis of vouchers passed, after verification of actual contract notes received from the broker / counterparty and con

conditions: if any, shall be properly recorded
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Notwithstanding paragraph 21 of these Directions, securities held in
physical form, if any, shall be properly recorded, held under joint custody,
and shall be subjected to quarterly verification by persons unconnected with
their custody.
enriched_requirements.object: under joint custody, and shall be subjected to quarterly verification by persons unconnected with their custody

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Balances of Government Securities as per the RRB's books shall be
reconciled at least at quarterly intervals with the balances in the books of
the Public Debt Office (PDO), RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: at quarterly intervals with the balances in the books of the Public Debt Office (PDO), RBI

conditions: If the number of transactions so warrant
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the number of transactions so warrant,
the reconciliation shall be undertaken more frequently, say monthly.
enriched_requirements.object: say monthly

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This
<image>
reconciliation shall be periodically checked by the internal audit department
of the RRB.
enriched_requirements.object: the internal audit department of the RRB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) There shall be a system for reporting transactions to Top Management on
a weekly basis which shall include the details of transactions in securities,
details of SGL bouncing, and a review of investment transactions
undertaken during the period.
enriched_requirements.object: reporting transactions to Top Management on a weekly basis which shall include the details of transactions in securities, details of S

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall engage brokers on the terms and conditions specified hereunder:
(1) The role of the broker shall be restricted to that of bringing the two parties
to the deal together.
enriched_requirements.object: terms and conditions specified hereunder: (1) The role of the broker shall be restricted to that of bringing the two parties to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the same shall be
disclosed after it is decided to enter into the transaction to facilitate direct
settlement between counterparties.
enriched_requirements.object: is decided to enter into the transaction to facilitate direct settlement between counterparties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (2) The brokers shall not have any role in the process of settlement of deals.
enriched_requirements.object: the process of settlement of deals

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The settlement of the deal shall take place directly between the
counterparties, viz., both fund settlement and delivery of security.
enriched_requirements.object: the counterparties, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) An RRB shall maintain a record of broker-wise details of deals put through
and brokerage paid.
enriched_requirements.object: broker-wise details of deals put through and brokerage paid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) An RRB shall not transact in Government Securities in physical form with
any broker.
enriched_requirements.object: in physical form with any broker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (5) An RRB shall not engage services of any broker in inter-bank transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: broker in inter-bank transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the above prohibition shall not apply to RRBs undertaking
securities transactions among themselves through members of a
recognised stock exchange.
enriched_requirements.object: securities transactions among themselves through members of a recognised stock exchange
include the following: (1) SEBI Registration

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that aggregate transactions (both purchases and sales)
executed through an individual broker do not exceed 5 per cent of total
transactions through brokers in a financial year under review, subject to the
following conditions:
(1) The limit shall be observed with reference to the year under review and the
RRB shall keep in view the expected turnover of the current year which
shall be based on turnover of the previous year and anticipated rise or fall
in the volume of business in the current year.
enriched_requirements.object: (both purchases and sales) executed through an individual broker do not exceed 5 per cent of total transactions through brokers in a financial year under review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The limit shall cover both the business initiated by the RRB and the
business offered / brought by a broker.
enriched_requirements.object: initiated by the RRB and the business offered / brought by a broker

conditions:
where no
brokers are involved
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Transactions entered into directly with counterparties, i.e., where no
brokers are involved, shall be excluded to arrive at the total transactions
through brokers.
enriched_requirements.object: at the total transactions through brokers

conditions:
If for any reason it becomes necessary to exceed the aggregate limit for
any broker
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) If for any reason it becomes necessary to exceed the aggregate limit for
any broker, the RRB shall record in writing the specific reasons for such
breach and the Board shall be informed post facto.
enriched_requirements.object: specific reasons for such breach and the Board shall be informed post facto

conditions: In case of repo transactions both the legs of the deals
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In case of repo transactions both the legs of the deals, i.e., purchase as
well as sale shall be included to arrive at the volume of total transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: at the volume of total transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The limit of 5 per cent shall not apply to transactions through Primary
Dealers.
enriched_requirements.object: Primary Dealers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Treasury transactions shall be separately subjected to concurrent audit and the
results of the audit shall be placed before the Chief Executive of the RRB once
every month.
enriched_requirements.object: concurrent audit and the results of the audit shall be placed before the Chief Executive of the RRB once every month

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The business done through brokers shall be audited by the same concurrent
auditors who audit the treasury operations of the RRB, and the audit report shall
be included in the monthly report to the Chief Executive of the RRB.
enriched_requirements.object: same concurrent auditors who audit the treasury operations of the RRB, and the audit report shall be included in the monthly report

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The concurrent audit shall, at the minimum:
(1) Ensure that investments held by the RRB as on the last reporting Friday of
each quarter and as reported to the Reserve Bank are actually owned / held
by it in SGL / CSGL / Gilt account / dematerialised account or in a physical
form, where applicable.
enriched_requirements.object: (1) Ensure that investments held by the RRB as on the last reporting Friday of each quarter and as reported to the Reserve Bank are actually owned / held by it in SGL / CSGL / Gilt account / dematerialised account or in a physical form

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The internal audit shall cover the transactions in securities on an ongoing basis,
monitor compliance with the laid down management policies / prescribed
procedures and report the deficiencies directly to the Top Management.
enriched_requirements.object: securities on an ongoing basis, monitor compliance with the laid down management policies / prescribed procedures and report

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The internal auditors / internal audit department shall periodically check the
reconciliation of SGL / CSGL account balance with PDO, as required in
Paragraph 88(6) of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of SGL / CSGL account balance with PDO, as required in Paragraph 88(6) of these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Reconciliation of holdings of Government Securities - Audit Certificate
(1) An RRB shall furnish a 'Statement of reconciliation of investments' as at the
end of every accounting year duly certified by its auditors.
enriched_requirements.object: reconciliation of investments' as at the end of every accounting year duly certified by its auditors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The statement
shall be submitted to the Regional Office of NABARD under whose
jurisdiction the RRB's Head Office is located within one month from the
close of the financial year.
enriched_requirements.object: Regional Office of NABARD under whose jurisdiction the RRB's Head Office is located within one month from the close of the financi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An RRB, in letters of appointment issued to its external auditors, shall
suitably include the aforementioned requirement of reconciliation.
enriched_requirements.object: requirement of reconciliation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall undertake a half-yearly review (as of March 31st and September
30th) of its investment portfolio which shall be placed before the Board within two
months, i.e., by end-May and end-November.
enriched_requirements.object: (as of March 31st and September 30th) of its investment portfolio which shall be placed before the Board within two mon

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The review shall, at the minimum,
cover operational aspects of investment portfolio including reconciliation of SGL
/ CSGL accounts with PDO, SGL bouncing, amendments made to the
Investment Policy, business put through any individual broker or brokers in
excess of the limit with the reasons therefor, irregularities observed in all audit
reports, position of compliance thereto and certify adherence to laid down
internal Investment Policy and procedures and Reserve Bank's guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: cover operational aspects of investment portfolio including reconciliation of SGL / CSGL accounts with PDO, SGL bouncing, amendments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the half-yearly review report put up to the Board shall be submitted to
NABARD by June 15 and December 15 respectively, in a format as advised by
NABARD.
enriched_requirements.object: by June 15 and December 15 respectively, in a format as advised by NABARD

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall recognise income on accrual basis for the following investments:
(1) Government Securities, bonds, and debentures of corporate bodies, where
interest rates on these securities are predetermined and provided interest
is serviced regularly and is not in arrears.
enriched_requirements.object: basis for the following investments: (1) Government Securities, bonds, and debentures of corporate bodies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Income from units of mutual funds shall be recognised on cash basis.
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall not capitalise the broken period interest paid to the seller as part
of cost and shall treat it as an item of expenditure under Profit & Loss Account in
respect of investments in securities.
enriched_requirements.object: interest paid to the seller as part of cost and shall treat it as an item of expenditure under Profit & Loss Account in r

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: This accounting treatment does not consider the tax implications
and an RRB shall comply with the requirements of Income Tax Authorities as
prescribed.
enriched_requirements.object: of Income Tax Authorities as prescribed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
1An RRB shall create Investment Fluctuation Reserve (IFR) out of the realised
gains on sale of investments, subject to the availability of net profit, until the
amount of IFR is at least 2 per cent of the HFT and AFS portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: (IFR) out of the realised gains on sale of investments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This minimum
requirement shall be assessed annually and shall be computed with reference to
the book value of investments in AFS and HFT categories as of the balance sheet
date.
enriched_requirements.object: shall be computed with reference to the book value of investments in AFS and HFT categories as of the balance sheet date

conditions:
if any, and net of
1 Substituted with effect from May 18
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accounting Treatment
(1) The provisions required to be created on account of depreciation in the AFS
and HFT category in any year shall be debited to the Profit and Loss
Account and an equivalent amount (net of tax benefit, if any, and net of
1 Substituted with effect from May 18, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Classification,
Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated May 18, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: Profit and Loss Account and an equivalent amount (net of tax benefit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
consequent reduction in the transfer to Statutory Reserve) or the balance
available in the Investment Fluctuation Reserve (IFR) Account, whichever
is less, shall be transferred from the IFR Account to the Profit and Loss
Account.
enriched_requirements.object: IFR Account to the Profit and Loss Account

conditions:
if any, and net of transfer to Statutory
Reserves as applicable to such excess provision)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In the event provisions created on account of depreciation in the AFS and
HFT category are found to be in excess of the required amount in any year,
the excess shall be credited to the Profit and Loss Account and an
equivalent amount (net of taxes, if any, and net of transfer to Statutory
Reserves as applicable to such excess provision), shall be appropriated to
the IFR Account to be utilised to meet future depreciation requirement for
investments in this category.
enriched_requirements.object: Profit and Loss Account and an equivalent amount (net of taxes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The amounts debited to the Profit and Loss Account for provision and the
amounts credited to the Profit and Loss Account for reversal of excess
provision shall be debited and credited respectively under the head
'Expenditure - Provisions & Contingencies'.
enriched_requirements.object: respectively under the head 'Expenditure - Provisions & Contingencies'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The amounts appropriated from
the Profit and Loss Account and the amounts transferred from the IFR
Account to the Profit and Loss Account shall be shown as "below the line"
items after determining the profit for the year.
enriched_requirements.object: the line" items after determining the profit for the year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The IFR Account shall be
shown as a separate item in Schedule 2 "Reserves and Surplus" under the
Head "Revenue and other Reserves".
enriched_requirements.object: separate item in Schedule 2 "Reserves and Surplus" under the Head "Revenue and other Reserves"

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (4) IFR shall be eligible for inclusion in Tier 2 capital.
enriched_requirements.object: in Tier 2 capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the cap applicable on recognition of General Provisions and
Loss Reserves as Tier 2 capital is not applicable on IFR.
enriched_requirements.object: recognition of General Provisions and Loss Reserves as Tier 2 capital is not applicable on IFR

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall be permitted to draw down the balance available in IFR in excess
of 2 per cent of its HFT and AFS portfolio for credit to the balance of profit / loss
as disclosed in the Profit and Loss Account at the end of any accounting year.
enriched_requirements.object: down the balance available in IFR in excess of 2 per cent of its HFT and AFS portfolio for credit to the balance of profit / loss

conditions:
Where the balance in the IFR is less than two percent of the HFT and AFS
investment portfolio
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where the balance in the IFR is less than two percent of the HFT and AFS
investment portfolio, a draw down shall be permitted subject to the following
conditions:
(1) The drawn down amount shall be used only for meeting the minimum Tier
1 capital requirements by way of appropriation to free reserves or reducing
the balance of loss;
enriched_requirements.object: the following conditions: (1) The drawn down amount shall be used only for meeting the minimum Tier 1 capital requirements by

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
<image>
(2) The amount drawn down shall not be more than the extent the MTM
provisions / losses during the aforesaid year exceed the net profit on sale
of investments during that year.
enriched_requirements.object: extent the MTM provisions / losses during the aforesaid year exceed the net profit on sale of investments during that year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Paragraph 108(1) above shall apply mutatis-mutandis to preference shares
where the fixed dividend is not paid.
enriched_requirements.object: shares where the fixed dividend is not paid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the dividend on preference shares
(cumulative or noncumulative) is not declared / paid in any year it shall be
treated as due / unpaid in arrears and the date of balance sheet of the
issuer for that particular year shall be reckoned as due date for the purpose
of asset classification;
enriched_requirements.object: / unpaid in arrears and the date of balance sheet of the issuer for that particular year shall be reckoned as due date for the purpo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In the case of equity shares, in the event the investment in the shares of
any company is valued at ₹1 per company on account of the non-availability
of the latest balance sheet in accordance with paragraph 59 of these
Directions, those equity shares shall be reckoned as NPI;

conditions: If any credit facility availed by the issuer is NPA in the books of the RRB
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
or
(4) If any credit facility availed by the issuer is NPA in the books of the RRB,
investment in any of the securities, including preference shares issued by
the same issuer shall also be treated as NPI and vice versa.
enriched_requirements.object: NPI and vice versa

conditions:
where only the preference
shares are classified as NPI
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, this
stipulation shall not be applicable in cases where only the preference
shares are classified as NPI, and in such cases, the investment in any of
the other performing securities issued by the same issuer need not be
classified as NPI and any performing credit facilities granted to that
borrower need not be treated as NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: where only the preference shares are classified as NPI, and in such cases, the investment in any of the other performing securi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Once an investment is classified as an NPI, it shall be segregated from rest of
the portfolio and not considered for setting off valuation gains and losses.
enriched_requirements.object: of the portfolio and not considered for setting off valuation gains and losses

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An RRB shall not accrue any income on NPIs.
enriched_requirements.object: NPIs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Irrespective of the category (i.e., HTM, AFS, or HFT) in which the investment has
been placed, an RRB shall make appropriate provisions for the depreciation in
the value of the investment.
enriched_requirements.object: the depreciation in the value of the investment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investment in Government Securities and Government guaranteed securities
(1) An RRB shall not classify its investment in Central Government Securities
and State Government Securities as NPI.
enriched_requirements.object: Central Government Securities and State Government Securities as NPI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An RRB shall not classify investments in Central Government guaranteed
securities as NPI unless the Central Government has repudiated the
guarantee when invoked.
enriched_requirements.object: Government guaranteed securities as NPI unless the Central Government has repudiated the guarantee when invoked

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of such securities held in AFS and
HFT, an RRB shall continue to recognise MTM gains / losses.
enriched_requirements.object: gains / losses

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However,
any income shall be recognised only on realisation basis.
enriched_requirements.object: realisation basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) An RRB shall classify its investments in State Government guaranteed
securities as NPI and apply prudential norms for identification of NPI and
provisioning, if interest / instalment of principal (including maturity
proceeds) or any other amount due to the RRB remains unpaid for more
than 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: State Government guaranteed securities as NPI and apply prudential norms for identification of NPI and provisioning

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior
to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

conditions: Where client / constituent accounts are permitted
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where client / constituent accounts are permitted, a bank shall furnish similar
statements in respect of PMS client's Accounts and other constituents'
Accounts (including Brokers).
enriched_requirements.object: respect of PMS client's Accounts and other constituents' Accounts (including Brokers)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of PMS / other constituents' accounts,
the face value and book value of securities appearing in the relevant registers
of the bank shall be mentioned under Column 2.

Details of securities held on physical form (SGL Forms, scrips, letter of
allotment, subscription receipt etc.), if any, may be provided in the footnote.
enriched_requirements.object: footnote
